title: AuditRecord
description: Append-only, hash-chained accountability record (rule R6). Written for every consequential event: compile, config edit, approval, alarm ack, agent proposal, runtime explanation, shelving. hash_self = SHA256(canonical_json(record_without_hash_self) + hash_prev). Tampering or reordering breaks the chain and is detected on read. Tamper-EVIDENT, not tamper-proof (single trusted writer) — state this honestly.

action.description: Dotted action, e.g. graph.edge.update, alarm.ack, compile.run, agent.draft.propose, approval.grant, situation.created.

entity_type.description: e.g. causal_edge, alarm, compiled_model, situation, incident, agent_draft.

hash_prev.description: hash_self of the previous record (genesis = 64 zeros).

hash_self.description: SHA-256 over canonical JSON of this record (excluding hash_self) concatenated with hash_prev.
